prompt: In mux.go, the unexported `cleanPath` function maps an empty path to `"/"`. Perform a structural find-replace on that guard so an empty path maps to `"/index"` instead: rewrite the `if p == "" { return "/" }` block's returned value from `"/"` to `"/index"`. Change nothing else.

spec.cmd: printf 'package mux\nimport "testing"\nfunc TestCleanPathEmptyBench(t *testing.T){ if cleanPath("")!="/index" { t.Fatal(cleanPath("")) } }' > zz_cleanpath_test.go && go test -run TestCleanPathEmptyBench . >/dev/null 2>&1; rc=$?; rm -f zz_cleanpath_test.go; exit $rc
